name: GitHub Copilot

form_factor.comment: IDE agent mode (VS Code, JetBrains, Xcode, Neovim, Eclipse) + CLI + hosted cloud agent.

released_in.comment: Announced at GitHub Universe (Oct/Nov 2024) in preview. GA billing launch: June 18, 2025 when premium request billing began.

latest_major_update.comment: Copilot desktop app (technical preview): parallel agent sessions, PR lifecycle, scheduled workflows. Third-party agent support added. Usage-based billing announced.

rules.comment: Multiple layers: .github/copilot-instructions.md (repo-wide), path-specific .github/instructions/**, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, personal instructions, org-level.

skills.comment: Open Agent Skills standard. .github/skills, .claude/skills, .agents/skills. Personal skills in ~/.copilot/skills. gh skill CLI for discovery/install.

hooks.comment: Full lifecycle hook system: sessionStart, sessionEnd, userPromptSubmitted, preToolUse (approve/deny), postToolUse, agentStop, subagentStop, errorOccurred. .github/hooks/*.json.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP in cloud agent, CLI, and IDE. Supports local, stdio, http, sse transports. Built-in GitHub MCP server. Enterprise allowlist controls.

custom_commands.comment: Built-in slash commands in IDE (/fix, /tests, /explain, /help) and CLI (/delegate, /pr, /resume). Prompt files (*.prompt.md) for reusable snippets. No user-defined custom slash commands.

subagents.comment: Subagents in VS Code and JetBrains IDE agent mode. Isolated context window. Invocation: automatic, direct, or via #runSubagent. Cannot create sub-subagents.

model_selection.comment: Models from Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, xAI. Auto model selection available. Each model has a premium request multiplier.

approval_mode.comment: Desktop app has Interactive, Plan, and Autopilot modes. preToolUse hook can approve/deny. No universal 'always ask before X' toggle.

sandbox_mode.comment: Cloud agent runs in ephemeral GitHub Actions environment (natural sandbox). CLI has tool permission controls. No explicit sandbox toggle.

resume.comment: CLI: copilot --resume opens session picker, copilot --resume SESSION-ID jumps to specific session. /resume during interactive session.

continue.comment: CLI: copilot --continue resumes most recent session directly. IDE agent sessions persistent. Desktop app sessions in sidebar.

non_interactive.comment: CLI programmatic/scripted usage in GitHub Actions. --non-interactive mode. Copilot SDK for API-based integration.

output_format.comment: Copilot SDK provides programmatic access with structured responses. No documented --json flag for general CLI output.

statusline.comment: No statusline feature documented anywhere in GitHub Copilot's documentation.

telemetry.comment: Enterprise audit logging, agent session monitoring. Data retention: prompts retained 28 days. Users can opt out of training data. No granular telemetry UI.

custom_model_provider.comment: BYOK in CLI: env vars for provider type, base URL, API key. OpenAI-compatible endpoints, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, local models via Ollama.

notes: GitHub Copilot's agent capabilities span IDE, cloud, and CLI. The cloud agent is unique: runs in ephemeral GitHub Actions environment. Desktop app (preview) adds parallel agent sessions. Ecosystem is rapidly evolving with weekly feature drops.

pricing.comment: Free: $0/mo (50 premium requests). Pro: $10/mo (300 premium requests). Pro+: $39/mo (1500 premium requests). Usage-based billing starting June 2026.

hosted_agent.comment: Copilot Cloud Agent runs autonomously in GitHub Actions-powered ephemeral environment.
